metadata.siteDescription: Your trusted IT partner in Central Africa. Complete IT solutions for businesses and individuals in Gabon.
metadata.homeTitle: EMS GABON – IT Solutions in Gabon
metadata.homeDescription: EMS GABON offers complete IT services: maintenance, networks, Sage 100, security, fiber optics, training and web development for businesses and individuals in Gabon.

home.hero_title: Your IT Partner in Central Africa
home.hero_subtitle: EMS GABON supports businesses and individuals in Gabon through their digital transformation with local, reliable and accessible solutions.
home.why_subtitle: Local expertise at the service of your digital success
home.why_proximity_desc: Fast on-site intervention throughout Gabon. Our team goes where you are.
home.why_expertise_desc: Certified on Sage, Microsoft Server and security solutions. Proven expertise.
home.why_reactivity_desc: Available support and emergency intervention. Your business never stops.
home.why_cost_desc: Packages adapted to your budget, no surprises. Transparent and competitive rates.
home.why_local_desc: Solutions designed for the Gabonese and African context, optimized for local realities.
home.why_bilingual_desc: Communication in French at every step. A trained and attentive team.
home.services_subtitle: A complete offering for all your IT needs
home.partners_subtitle: Certified solutions to guarantee you the best
home.cta_title: Ready to modernize your IT system?
home.cta_subtitle: Contact us today for a free audit of your IT needs.
home.news_subtitle: The latest news and tips from our expert team

about.title: About EMS GABON
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for digital transformation in Gabon
about.history_text: EMS GABON is a Gabonese IT company founded by technology enthusiasts eager to provide quality IT solutions adapted to African realities. Since our founding, we have supported hundreds of businesses and individuals in their digital transformation.
about.mission_text: To support businesses and individuals in Gabon through their digital transformation, with local, reliable, adapted and accessible solutions.
about.vision_text: To become the reference IT partner in Central Africa, by providing innovative solutions and training the next generation of Gabonese digital professionals.
about.value_integrity_desc: We act with transparency and honesty in all our interactions.
about.value_excellence_desc: We strive for excellence in every project and intervention.
about.value_innovation_desc: We adopt the best technologies to meet your needs.
about.value_proximity_desc: We are where you are, listening to you and available.
about.zones_text: Our team operates in Libreville and the main cities of Gabon: Port-Gentil, Franceville, Oyem, Lambaréné, Mouila and industrial zones.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A complete and tailored offering for your needs
services.maintenance_desc: Preventive and corrective maintenance of your IT equipment. LAN/WAN network installation and configuration.
services.config_desc: Configuration of workstations, servers, routers, switches and network equipment of all brands.
services.sage_desc: Installation, configuration and support of the Sage 100 management solution in local or cloud mode.
services.server_desc: Deployment and administration of Windows servers, Active Directory, GPO and Microsoft infrastructure.
services.security_desc: Installation of CCTV cameras, anti-intrusion systems, access control and remote supervision.
services.fiber_desc: Installation and deployment of fiber optic networks for businesses. Testing and certification.
services.training_desc: Customized training for users, administrators and developers. On-site or remote.
services.webdev_desc: Creation of custom websites and applications, modern and high-performance.
services.support_desc: Technical assistance by phone, remote or on-site. Maintenance contracts.
services.portal_desc: Installation and configuration of automatic gates for secure access to your premises.

sage.title: Sage 100 Local & Cloud
sage.subtitle: The reference management solution for Gabonese businesses
sage.description: Sage 100 is an integrated management solution covering accounting, commercial management, payroll and human resources. EMS GABON is your official partner for Sage 100 installation, configuration and support in Gabon.
sage.local_desc: Sage 100 installed on your local servers for total control of your data.
sage.cloud_desc: Access Sage 100 from anywhere with a secure internet connection.

security.title: Security & CCTV
security.subtitle: Protect your premises and assets with professional solutions
security.description: EMS GABON installs and configures complete security systems for businesses and individuals: surveillance cameras, anti-intrusion systems, access control and automatic gates.
security.cctv_desc: Installation of high-definition IP cameras, DVR/NVR recorders and remote supervision systems.
security.alarm_desc: Motion detectors, alarm panels, sirens and immediate notification in case of intrusion.
security.access_desc: Access management by badge, biometrics or code. Entry/exit history.
security.portal_desc: Installation of automatic sliding or swing gates with remote control and intercom.

fiber.title: Fiber Optics
fiber.subtitle: Ultra-fast and reliable connections for your business
fiber.description: EMS GABON installs and deploys fiber optic networks for businesses wanting to benefit from high-performance, stable and scalable connectivity.

training.title: IT Training
training.subtitle: Build your skills with our training adapted to all levels
training.description: EMS GABON offers personalized IT training for all profiles: beginner users, network administrators, developers or business teams.
training.level_beginner_desc: Master the basics of computing, office applications and the internet.
training.level_intermediate_desc: Deepen your knowledge in system and network administration.
training.level_advanced_desc: Specialized training for administrators, developers and security experts.

entreprises.title: Business Solutions
entreprises.subtitle: Complete IT solutions to optimize your operations
entreprises.description: EMS GABON supports SMEs, administrations and large Gabonese businesses with a complete IT offering: infrastructure, security, management software and training.
entreprises.maintenance_desc: Preventive and corrective maintenance, IT asset management, LAN/WAN network installation and configuration.
entreprises.gestion_desc: Deployment of management solutions (Sage 100), Windows Server, Active Directory and Microsoft infrastructure.
entreprises.security_desc: Video surveillance, access control, anti-intrusion systems and automatic gates.
entreprises.portal_desc: Installation of automated gates for secure access to your business premises.
entreprises.training_desc: Training your teams on IT tools, security and best practices.

particuliers.title: Personal Solutions
particuliers.subtitle: Personalized IT assistance at home
particuliers.description: EMS GABON offers a range of IT services for individuals: troubleshooting, installation, home security and training.
particuliers.assistance_desc: PC troubleshooting, virus removal, data recovery and performance optimization.
particuliers.install_desc: Software installation, printer configuration, internet box, routers and network equipment.
particuliers.security_desc: Installation of surveillance cameras, alarms and automatic gates to secure your home.
particuliers.portal_desc: Automation of your residential gate with remote control and secure access systems.
particuliers.training_desc: Learn to use your computer, smartphone and everyday digital tools.

support.title: Support & Assistance
support.subtitle: A team available to handle all your technical needs
support.description: EMS GABON offers different technical support packages for businesses and individuals. Whether you need a one-time intervention or a regular maintenance contract, we have the right solution.
support.phone_desc: Assistance by phone and WhatsApp for common problems.
support.remote_desc: Remote control of your computer to solve problems quickly.
support.onsite_desc: Our technicians travel to your home or business.
support.preventive_desc: Regular check of your systems to prevent breakdowns.
support.contract_incident_desc: One-time intervention billed by the hour or fixed price.
support.contract_annual_desc: Complete maintenance with scheduled preventive visits.

realisations.title: Our Portfolio
realisations.subtitle: Concrete projects for satisfied clients
realisations.description: Discover some of our projects completed for businesses, administrations and individuals in Gabon.

footer.description: EMS GABON – Your trusted IT partner in Central Africa. IT solutions for businesses and individuals.
